name: @benoss/web
description: Benoss web frontend – Jinja2 templates + vanilla JS served by apps/api

scripts.serve: echo 'Frontend is served by apps/api (FastAPI + Jinja2). Run: cd ../api && uvicorn benoss_api.main:app --reload'

notes.architecture: Templates in apps/web/templates/ are rendered by FastAPI (Jinja2Templates). Static assets in apps/web/static/ are served at /static/. Future: migrate to a SPA (Vite + React/Vue) that calls apps/api directly.
